name: idbutils

metadata.name: idbutils
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v2 (GPLv2)
metadata.summary: Utility library for writing database and internet apps.

documentation:
# utilities
A library of Python utilities useful for database and internet apps.

modules.name: idbutils.derived_enum
documentation: Functions for deriving enums from other enums.

documentation: Return an instance of enun instantiated with string using a fuzzy match.

functions.name: idbutils.derived_enum._from_string
documentation: Return an instance of enum instantiated with string.

functions.name: idbutils.derived_enum.derive
documentation: Return a new Enum with the names and values of the parent enum added to the supplied dict's name and values.

functions.name: idbutils.list_and_dict.dict_filter_none_values

documentation: Return a dictionary with all items from the input dictionary who's keys appear in the list.

modules.name: idbutils.csv_importer
documentation: Class for importing data from a CSV file.

classes.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.__init__
documentation:
Return an instance of CsvImporter.

Paramters:
    filename (string): name (full path) of the file to import
    cols_map (dict): A mapping of columns of the form 'source col': ('destination col', map_function)
    write_entry_func (function): Will be called once for each line of data.

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.map_identity
documentation: Identity mapping.

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.map_integer
documentation: Map the value to an integer.

documentation: Map the value to an float.

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.map_ymd_date
documentation: Map the year-month-day string to a datetime.

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.map_mdy_date
documentation: Map the month/day/year string to a datetime.

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.map_time
documentation: Map the minutes:seconds string to a datetime.time.

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.map_meters
documentation: Map meters to feet.

methods.name: idbutils.csv_importer.CsvImporter.map_kgs
documentation: Map kilograms to pounds.

classes.name: idbutils.json_file_processor.JsonFileProcessor

methods.name: idbutils.json_file_processor.JsonFileProcessor.__init__
documentation:
Return an instance of JsonFileProcessor.

Parameters:
----------
    file_regex (string): only process files that match this regex
    input_file (string): file (full path) to check for data
    input_dir (string): directory (full path) to check for data files
    latest (Boolean): check for latest files only
    debug (Boolean): enable debug logging
    recursive (Boolean): check the search directory recursively
